infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: NutriSnap uses your location to personalize local seasonal ingredients and nearby store suggestions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NutriSnap needs photo library access when you choose to upload recipe or profile images.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NutriSnap needs camera access when you choose to capture photos for recipe or profile updates.
